title: Workflow Syntax, Expressions, YAML, and Data Contracts · Workflow Trust Lens: Ci Expression Types Coercion Functions
summary: A workflow parses but triggers unexpectedly, treats false as text, expands a multiline output incorrectly, inherits a permissive default, and hides a misspelled key. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci expression types coercion functions increment in validated workflow data contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about expression literals, loose equality, coercion, truthiness, functions, object filters, fromJSON, and toJSON without leaking data.
Control YAML scalars, booleans, quoting, multiline blocks, reserved-looking keys, indentation, and serialization boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.

version-baseline:

  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2

  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-expression-types-coercion-functions — Reason about expression literals, loose equality, coercion, truthiness, functions, object filters, fromJSON, and toJSON without leaking data.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-gha-workflow-syntax-expressions-3
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-workflow-syntax-expressions-3
    artifact: workflow-contract.yaml
    decision: worked gha workflow syntax expressions 3
    environment: Node 24 TypeScript monorepo with three lockfiles
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      name: verified-ci
      on-events: [pull_request, push]
      permissions: contents-read
      concurrency: revision-scoped
      expression-input: parsed-with-fromJSON
      shell-input: validated-environment
      schema: action-inputs-reviewed
      changed-event-fixture: fork-pull-request
    verify: validate workflow schema expressions context availability action inputs and changed event fixtures
    failure: Reject valid-YAML-only review, implicit coercion, unavailable contexts, or direct untrusted expression interpolation.
    repair: Validate workflow semantics, parse explicit types, move untrusted values through data boundaries, and test changed payloads.
